Petn For Determination That Modification Of Irrevocable Trust Does Not Violate No Contest Clause In Trust
Off Calendar Mar-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Tremain for Brandon James (Petitioner).

The Court reviewed the documents and concluded that the petition does not violate the no contest clause in the trust. The Court granted the petition, (subject to review of the order).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR#13358. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
